metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace - skills, MCP servers, and behavioral guidelines

plugins.name: plan-viewer
plugins.description: Browser-based visual viewer for architecture and planning phases. Provides diagrams, flowcharts, and layout comparisons.

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Project scaffolding launcher. Generates Next.js full-stack and Turborepo monorepo projects from presets.

plugins.name: web-presentation
plugins.description: Single-file HTML presentation generator. Creates self-contained slideshows with no external dependencies.

plugins.name: kotlin-spring-tdd
plugins.description: Kotlin + Spring Boot TDD - RED/GREEN/REFACTOR 체계적 접근법. Kotest + MockK 기반.

plugins.name: behavioral-guidelines(CLAUDE.md)
plugins.description: LLM coding best practices - think before coding, simplicity, surgical changes, goal-driven execution.

plugins.name: cloudflare-mcps
plugins.description: Cloudflare MCP servers - docs, Workers builds, Workers bindings, and observability.

plugins.name: dev-tools-mcps
plugins.description: Developer tool MCP servers - GitHub, Firecrawl, Context7, Magic UI, filesystem, memory, sequential-thinking.

plugins.name: deploy-mcps
plugins.description: Deployment platform MCP servers - Vercel, Railway, and Supabase.

plugins.name: analytics-mcps
plugins.description: Analytics MCP servers - ClickHouse for analytics queries.
